lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body have no defects. The interior is in original condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows typical signs of wear and tear for its age. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a few small door dings, while the interior upholstery shows some fading and minor staining in the rear seats. Mechanically, the car is reliable for daily driving, though the engine has a minor oil seep and the brakes will likely need service within the next few thousand miles. It has been a dependable commuter, but it is priced to reflect its current cosmetic and mechanical state.

Looking for your next rewarding project? This car is a fantastic candidate for a full restoration or a valuable source of parts! While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it's a budget-friendly way to get your hands on a classic model. Perfect for a DIY enthusiast ready to bring a legend back to life!

This vehicle is in fair condition and would serve well as a budget-friendly option for a buyer willing to address some cosmetic and mechanical needs. The exterior shows visible signs of wear, including several noticeable scratches, minor dings on the rear bumper, and some clear coat peeling on the hood. Inside, the cabin shows its age with some staining on the carpet and a small tear in the driver's side upholstery. While the car is currently operational and drives, it will soon require routine maintenance, such as new brake pads and a set of tires. It is a solid, functional vehicle that provides honest transportation but does reflect its years of use.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical components are fully functional and in excellent working order.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Demonstrating consistent performance and a refined interior, it offers a balanced driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness. A sophisticated choice that delivers exceptional value without compromising on quality or reliability.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved and taken care of over the years. This car is perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great pulling into the driveway. I've truly enjoyed every mile in this beauty, but it's time for it to find a new home. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 2008 Porsche Cayman S features the mid-mounted 3.4L M97 flat-six, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is dialed in with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a limited-slip differential, ensuring exceptional lateral grip and turn-in response. Recent preventative maintenance includes a bore scope inspection, water pump replacement, and a fresh set of Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. While showing minor signs of use, the mechanical synchronicity and engine compression are excellent. A visceral driving experience with high-revving capability and tactile hydraulic steering.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regularly maintained. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, perfect for a driver who values both reliability and aesthetic appeal. The exterior shines with its original finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use, while the body remains straight and free of major blemishes. Inside, the cabin offers a clean, smoke-free environment with well-preserved upholstery and fully functional climate and entertainment systems. Mechanically, this car is sound; it starts promptly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and has a documented history of routine oil changes and inspections. Recent service includes new tires and a fresh brake pad set, ensuring it is road-ready from day one. This is a solid, honest car that offers a premium driving experience without the brand-new price tag.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent care. This well-maintained example offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust performance with sophisticated styling. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our professional standards for reliability, this offering represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term quality and automotive prestige.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of distinguished pedigree and proven reliability. This specimen has been maintained with rigorous attention to detail, ensuring that both its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presence remain exemplary. It offers a balanced synthesis of performance and sophistication, making it a premier choice for the discerning driver who demands excellence and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it has been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) features the refined 3.6L M96 flat-six powerplant delivering 320 hp via a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The engine benefits from a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recently replaced Air-Oil Separator (AOS), ensuring mechanical longevity. The chassis remains taut with updated bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining communicative steering and the characteristic rear-biased weight distribution. Braking performance is sharp, utilizing four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors for consistent thermal management. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain is robust, pulling strongly through the Variocam Plus powerband with no signs of bore scoring. A driver-focused example optimized for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance records available. Reliable engine. Minor cosmetic wear.

Discover a meticulously maintained vehicle that perfectly balances performance with everyday reliability. The exterior boasts its original luster, showing only the lightest signs of highway use consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, non-smoker cabin featuring supportive seating with no rips or stains and a fully functional suite of interior electronics. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts seamlessly, a testament to its consistent service

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a superior standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Rigorously inspected to ensure optimal performance, this unit offers a refined driving experience characterized by reliability and structural soundness. An ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a sophisticated balance of utility and enduring value.

Presenting a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained care. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our professional standards for performance and reliability. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, it represents a superior acquisition for the pragmatic yet discerning buyer. Available for immediate procurement.

Hey there! 👋 I'm looking for a new home for my trusty ride! It's in wonderful shape and has been so reliable for me over the years. I've really babied this car, and it runs like a charm. Whether you're heading out on a road trip or just cruising around town, you’re going to have a blast behind the wheel! Come take it for a spin—you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offering a mechanically sound 987.2 Cayman S, featuring the robust 9A1 3.4L flat-six engine with Direct Fuel Injection (DFI). This mid-engine platform utilizes a precise 6-speed manual transaxle and is equipped with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque vectoring. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and updated control arm bushings. Recent diagnostics confirm a clean DME report with no significant overrevs and consistent compression across all cylinders. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain exhibits excellent thermal management and linear power delivery, making it a purist's choice for
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. Mechanically sound. Recent service completed. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a reliable and well-cared-for ride. The exterior retains a deep, consistent shine, showing only the minor, honest character marks one would expect from careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery remaining firm and the dashboard free of sun damage or cracks. All electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced at regular intervals, with recent attention given to the braking system and a fresh oil change. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts without hesitation, and the tires have significant tread remaining. This car drives with a tight, responsive feel, offering a comfortable and confident experience whether you're commuting or on a long-distance trip. It comes complete with its original manuals and a documented service history.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, this offering represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, it has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure optimal roadworthiness. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who demands both reliability and a sophisticated profile.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute favorite ride, and it’s looking for a brand-new home! It’s in wonderful shape and has been so reliable for all my weekend trips. It runs like a dream and is super clean inside and out. You're going to love how it handles on the road—it's totally ready for its next big adventure today!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and high-revving double-VANOS timing system. The powertrain delivers linear torque through a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Mechanical highlights include a documented subframe reinforcement, a critical preventative measure for this chassis, and a recent valve clearance adjustment to maintain the valvetrain's precision. The suspension features upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring the MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear geometry remains planted under high lateral loads. This vehicle offers a visceral, analog driving experience with the mechanical sortedness required for spirited performance.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable runner. Recent service complete.
This 2019 Lexus RX 350 in Nebula Gray Pearl is the epitome of a well-cared-for luxury SUV.

This exceptional vehicle represents a sophisticated acquisition for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability alongside a well-preserved exterior and interior. Benefiting from a documented service history, this automobile offers a refined balance of performance and long-term value. We invite you to experience the superior standard of our curated inventory.
